narrative.when: 周一上午九点，刚打开电脑
narrative.who: 甲（收件人）· 乙（同事，发邮件来的人）
narrative.how: 打开邮箱看新邮件，认真阅读后回复
narrative.method: 打开邮件读内容、思考怎么回、打字回复、确认发送
narrative.event: 乙发来一封紧急邮件，甲要在中午前给出回复

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good morning. I have a new letter.
turns.zh: 早上好。我收到一封新信。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: This note is from the second one. The name says 'quick'.
turns.zh: 这是乙发来的。标题写着‘紧急’。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will open it now.
turns.zh: 我现在打开看看。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: He has to get a paper before 12.
turns.zh: 他必须在中午前拿到一份报告。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is three hours from now.
turns.zh: 离中午还有三个小时。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I have the numbers for last three months.
turns.zh: 我有过去三个月的数据。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I have a note or two to put in.
turns.zh: 我得加一两句说明。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will go through it again to be safe.
turns.zh: 我再过一遍，确保安全。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: No, it is clear. I see what he would like.
turns.zh: 没问题，很清楚了。我知道他要什么。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right, time to give an answer.
turns.zh: 好了，准备回答。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, I will put it down now.
turns.zh: 好，我现在就写下来。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Dear friend, thanks for your letter.
turns.zh: 朋友你好，来信收到。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I have the numbers you need.
turns.zh: 你要的数字我这里有。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Let me put it all together.
turns.zh: 我把它整理好。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will send it before twelve.
turns.zh: 中午前发给你。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right, I will make a note of the numbers.
turns.zh: 好，我把数字记下来。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Here is the list for the last three months.
turns.zh: 这是过去三个月的清单。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right, that is all he had a desire for.
turns.zh: 行，他要的就是这些。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will put it in the body of the letter.
turns.zh: 我把它写在邮件正文里。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Do I need to say more?
turns.zh: 我还要多说点什么吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: No, keep it short and clear.
turns.zh: 不用，简短清楚就行。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right, then I will send it off.
turns.zh: 好，那我这就发出去。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Let me have another look at the name.
turns.zh: 让我再看一眼名字。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: It is right. Ready to go.
turns.zh: 没错。可以发了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: There, it is sent. Done.
turns.zh: 好了，发出去了。搞定。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right, the letter is off. What now?
turns.zh: 好了，邮件发出去了。接下来呢？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will keep for his word.
turns.zh: 我等他的回话。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Do you have any other work?
turns.zh: 你还有其他工作吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, but this one was the chief one.
turns.zh: 有，但这封是最要紧的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good thing you did it before the middle of the day.
turns.zh: 好在你在中午前搞定了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: True. I was not certain I would have all the numbers.
turns.zh: 是啊。我本来还不确定能不能凑齐所有数据。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: But you did. That is a weight off.
turns.zh: 但你做到了。这下轻松了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, let us get a cup of tea.
turns.zh: 好，我们去喝杯茶。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That sounds good. My drink is cold.
turns.zh: 好主意。我的饮料都凉了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. Let us go before another letter comes.
turns.zh: 行。趁另一封邮件来之前赶紧去。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: What did you put in the letter?
turns.zh: 你在信里写了什么？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I gave the numbers and a short note.
turns.zh: 我附上了数据，还加了一段简短说明。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Will you send more after this?
turns.zh: 你会在这之后补发吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: No, I kept it short. That is all I have.
turns.zh: 没有，我写得很简短。我手头就这些。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is right. Better than being kept waiting.
turns.zh: 有道理。总比让人干等着强。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Let us go over the numbers again.
turns.zh: 我们再把数据核对一遍。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I did that before sending.
turns.zh: 我发之前已经核对过了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: One small error and we look foolish.
turns.zh: 一个小错误就会让我们显得很不专业。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. I will have another look.
turns.zh: 有道理。我再检查一遍。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. The table is clear and simple.
turns.zh: 好。表格清晰又简单。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes. I put notes under the numbers.
turns.zh: 是的。我在数字下面加了注释。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That will help him see the story.
turns.zh: 这样他能看出数据背后的情况。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I hope so. He was quick.
turns.zh: 希望如此。他当时很快。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You did well. Now we keep quiet for his answer.
turns.zh: 你做得很好。现在我们安静等他回复。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. Let us get that tea before he sends word back.
turns.zh: 对。趁他还没回复，我们去喝杯茶。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, I will put the words on paper now.
turns.zh: 好，我现在开始写文字。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Put his place first.
turns.zh: 先填他的地址。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Got it. What is the line about?
turns.zh: 明白。是关于什么内容的标题？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Quick answer on the numbers.
turns.zh: 关于数字的快速回复。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. Now the body. Keep it short.
turns.zh: 好。现在写正文。简短些。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Dear friend, your note came. I have put the numbers here.
turns.zh: 朋友，你好。来信收到，数据附上。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is clear. Then say he may send word if he has a question.
turns.zh: 很清楚。然后说有问题可以随时联系。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Say if anything is not clear. Best, A.
turns.zh: 如有不清楚的地方请说。祝好，甲。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will put the two papers with it now.
turns.zh: 我现在把两份文件附上。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. See the name and send it.
turns.zh: 好。看看名字，然后发送。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. I will put the two papers with it now.
turns.zh: 好。我现在把这两份文件附上。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. Have a look at the name and send it.
turns.zh: 好。看一眼名字就发出去。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I have put them in. Let me see the name.
turns.zh: 我已经附上了。让我看看名字。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is for the second person. Right.
turns.zh: 是给第二个人的。没错。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Now the body. I will say it again.
turns.zh: 现在看正文。我再念一遍。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Do not make it long. Short and clear is best.
turns.zh: 别写太长。简短清楚最好。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It is short. I have said all that is needed.
turns.zh: 很短。我已经说了所有需要说的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Then send it. Time is going.
turns.zh: 那就发吧。时间在流逝。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: One more look at the papers. Are they right?
turns.zh: 再看一眼附件。对吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, they are. Send it now.
turns.zh: 是的，没问题。现在发送。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, here goes.
turns.zh: 好，这就发。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Let me see the time.
turns.zh: 等等，我看下时间。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Ten forty. Still an hour and twenty minutes.
turns.zh: 十点四十。还有一个小时二十分钟。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. No need to go quick.
turns.zh: 好。不用着急。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will put the papers in first.
turns.zh: 我先附上文件。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The list and the note are there.
turns.zh: 列表和说明都在里面了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Dear friend, thanks for your note.
turns.zh: 亲爱的朋友，感谢你的来信。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I have put the numbers in this note.
turns.zh: 我已将数字附在此便条中。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Short and clear, like you said.
turns.zh: 简短清楚，就像你说的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: If you have any questions, say so.
turns.zh: 如果有问题，请告诉我。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, that is good. Now I will send it.
turns.zh: 好的，这样就行了。现在我要发送了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Let me see the note again.
turns.zh: 让我再看一遍便条。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, all is clear. No errors.
turns.zh: 是的，都很清楚。没有错误。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Then put the papers with it.
turns.zh: 好。那就把文件附上吧。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I have done that. Two papers are there.
turns.zh: 我已经附上了。两个文件都在里面。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Now the send button. Here goes.
turns.zh: 现在点发送按钮。来了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It is sent. The box says 'done'.
turns.zh: 发送成功。屏幕上显示‘完成’。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good work. That was quick.
turns.zh: 干得好。挺快的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes. I have time for a rest now.
turns.zh: 是的。我现在有时间休息一下了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Take your drink. It is still warm.
turns.zh: 喝你的饮料吧。还温着呢。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, I will take a rest now.
turns.zh: 好了，我现在要休息一下。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You have done well this morning.
turns.zh: 你今天上午干得不错。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thanks. It was not hard.
turns.zh: 谢谢。其实不难。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Still, you kept your head.
turns.zh: 不过，你保持了冷静。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is true. I did not let the quick get to me.
turns.zh: 那倒是。我没让急事影响自己。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Now you can put your feet up.
turns.zh: 好。现在你可以放松一下了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will. But first, I will send a note to say it is done.
turns.zh: 我会的。但首先，我要发个消息说已经完成了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is a good idea. Keep them in the picture.
turns.zh: 好主意。让他们了解情况。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: There. Done. Now I am free.
turns.zh: 好了。完成了。现在我没事了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Great. Let us get another cup of tea.
turns.zh: 太好了。我们再喝杯茶吧。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, I will send a quick note to say it is done.
turns.zh: 好，我发个简讯说搞定了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Keep it short and clear.
turns.zh: 好。简短清楚就行。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Just a line or two. No need for more.
turns.zh: 一两行就行。不用多写。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is right. I will put 'Done' as the name.
turns.zh: 有道理。我就把主题写成‘已完成’。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is good. Then they see it quick.
turns.zh: 这样行。他们一眼就看到了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: There. Sent. Now I am free.
turns.zh: 好了。发出去了。现在我没事了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Well, great. Let us get another cup of tea.
turns.zh: 好。我们再喝杯茶吧。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I would like that. My first cup is cold.
turns.zh: 好啊。我第一杯都凉了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Same here. Let us go to the place for drinks.
turns.zh: 我也是。我们去茶水间吧。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: After you. I am ready for a rest.
turns.zh: 你先请。我准备好歇会儿了。

storyBlurb: 周一清晨，甲刚打开电脑就看到乙的紧急邮件，必须在中午前回复。他认真阅读、思考措辞，最终在截止时间前发送确认。
storyScript:
【开场·收到邮件】周一上午九点，办公室的日光灯刚亮起。甲端着咖啡坐到工位前，按下电脑电源键。屏幕亮起的瞬间，邮箱图标跳出红色数字——一封新邮件。他点开，发件人是同事乙，标题写着「紧急：请于今日中午前回复」。甲眉头微皱，放下杯子，双击打开。邮件正文不长，但措辞急切：乙负责的项目出现突发状况，需要甲提供一份数据报告才能继续推进。甲扫了一眼时间，距离中午还有三个小时，足够处理。他深吸一口气，将邮件从头到尾又读了一遍，确保没有遗漏任何细节。

【进行·撰写回复】甲打开一个空白邮件窗口，光标在收件人栏闪烁。他先输入乙的地址，然后敲下主题：「关于紧急数据的回复」。正文怎么写？甲托腮思考片刻，决定先理清思路：乙需要的是上季度销售数据，但自己手头只有部分统计，需要补充说明。他新建一个文档，快速列出关键数字，又附上简要分析。确认无误后，甲开始打字。手指在键盘上敲击，一行行文字跃然屏上：先致谢乙的来信，再说明数据已附上，最后提醒乙如有疑问可随时联系。写完后，甲逐句检查措辞是否准确、语气是否恰当。他删掉了一个多余的形容词，又调整了句子的顺序，让逻辑更清晰。

【收束·发送确认】甲将光标移到附件图标，点击「插入」——刚刚整理好的数据表格和说明文档依次附上。他再次核对收件人、主题和正文，确认没有错别字或格式问题。一切就绪，甲的手指悬在「发送」按钮上方。他看了一眼屏幕右下角的时间：十点四十分，距离中午还有一小时二十分，时间充裕。甲轻点鼠标，邮件瞬间飞出。屏幕上弹出「邮件已发送」的提示，他靠回椅背，长舒一口气。窗外的阳光正好洒在键盘上，甲端起已经微凉的咖啡，抿了一口，嘴角浮起一丝轻松的笑意。
